title: Provision AWS RDS Staging Database
description:
Create an AWS RDS staging database instance with the appropriate engine, configure a security group that restricts access to the Cloudways staging IP only, and create the staging database and user.

This is an owner-driven task due to insurance and security compliance requirements (CSO responsibility). Credentials must be stored in the team vault.
acceptance_criteria: Laravel staging application connects to the RDS instance successfully
migrate:status shows all migrations as Ran
Security group blocks public access and allows only the Cloudways staging IP
Database credentials are stored in the team vault
data_model_changes: New RDS staging database instance with staging-specific database and user provisioned.
implementation_notes: Part of Phase 2 infrastructure setup. RDS engine choice depends on MBT-RDS decision. Security group must restrict access to Cloudways staging IP only. This step must be performed by the CSO (Ryan) due to insurance and compliance requirements. See docs/JIRA_TICKET_BACKLOG.md Phase 2.
